subtitle: Delivering DBaaS Across Hybrid, Multi-Cloud, and Sovereign Kubernetes Environments
intro: KubeDB by AppsCode and SUSE Rancher Prime deliver a Kubernetes-native Database-as-a-Service (DBaaS) platform that lets organizations run production databases anywhere Kubernetes runs—on-prem, cloud, edge, and air-gapped environments. The joint solution combines SUSE's centralized Kubernetes management with KubeDB's automated database lifecycle management, including provisioning, scaling, high availability, backup, and recovery. The result is a portable, governed, and operationally consistent DBaaS platform that eliminates cloud lock-in.

items.name: Unified DBaaS Across Any Kubernetes
items.description: Deliver a consistent DBaaS experience across on-prem, cloud, and edge. Move databases across hybrid and multi-cloud infrastructure without re-architecting.

items.name: Automated Database Lifecycle Management
items.description: Provisioning, scaling, upgrades, and high availability are fully automated through Kubernetes APIs—reducing manual effort and ensuring consistency.

items.name: Built-In Backup, Recovery, and Resilience
items.description: Application-consistent backup and recovery for stateful workloads, with reliable restores and disaster recovery across clusters.

items.name: Governance, Security, and Multi-Tenancy
items.description: RBAC, policy-driven access, and namespace-based multi-tenancy enable secure self-service database access at enterprise scale.

items.name: Data Sovereignty and Infrastructure Control
items.description: Deploy on-prem, in-region, or in air-gapped environments with full control over data placement to meet compliance requirements.

highlights.title: Why SUSE Rancher Prime + KubeDB
highlights.subtitle: DBaaS Anywhere. Any Kubernetes. Any Storage. Full Control.

items.name: Streamlined Kubernetes Operations
items.description: Unified Kubernetes management across on-prem, cloud, and edge—standardizing platform operations at scale.

items.name: Automated Database Operations
items.description: Kubernetes-native APIs to provision, scale, upgrade, and manage databases—removing manual day-2 toil.

items.name: Trusted and Secure Platform
items.description: Centralized policy enforcement and access control with enterprise-grade governance across clusters.

items.name: Run Any Database Anywhere
items.description: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, MSSQL, Oracle, and more—running consistently on any CNCF-certified Kubernetes.
